title: centaurium babylonicum
intro: Centaurium babylonicum, also known as centaury, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its distinctive red flowers and square stems. Traditionally, centaury has been used in herbal medicine for its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant, making it beneficial for respiratory issues and skin conditions. Centaury can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal properties, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
